title: Flow cytometry to quantify tdTomato+  mDANs
author: Ellen Hertz

steps_raw.instruction: Triturate with 1 mL tip to dissociate mDANs in Neurobasal media with 10% fetal bovine serum.
Resuspend dissociated mDANs in Neurobasal media with 10% fetal bovine serum + 10 uM Y-27632 + 5 uM Emricasan to a concentration of 1 million cells per mL.
Dissociate Day 35 mDNAs with prewarmed papain with DNAse, Y-27632 and Emricasan for 00:10:00 at 37 °C . Note: iPSCs can be used as the negative control.
Pellet mDANs by centrifugation at 400 x g, °C, 5 minutes .
Use iPSCs to define tdTomato- population and use the threshold to determine tdTomato+ population in mDAN suspension.
Filter mDAN suspension through a strainer tube and keep filtered cell suspension on ice.
